name: tinkatink
flavor_texts: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.
text: Tinkatink is the Metalsmith Pokémon. It is a fairy and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: mold-breaker, own-tempo, pickpocket (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 45, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 35, Sp. Def: 64, Speed: 58. Evolution line: tinkatink → tinkatuff → tinkaton. Lore: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal. This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.
